transcript: Shit, you mean? I mean, bowel, what is bowel? Only thing I know about bowel is shit.
--give a shit what it was, man, you can't make me buy something I don't know about!
No, you think again. I don't think we ordered that.
Now, how you gonna make her pay you?
Well, you could get a little physical, 'cause I could get a little physical too.
I'm gonna call the police, and they're gonna come and get you. Okay?
No, you're committing the crime. You're just some sick old man.
Look, my husband is here, and he's gonna kill you if you don't stop callin' my house... [laughing]
